Terms

These terms apply when you use palmshed sdk.

Acceptance

By using palmshed sdk, you confirm that you have permission to share the content you submit with the AI processing services used by the application.

AI usage

Responses are generated with AI and can be incomplete, stale, or wrong. Check any output before relying on it, applying it, or using it in production.

Content

You retain ownership of content you submit. palmshed sdk does not claim rights over your inputs or outputs. Conversations are stored locally in your browser and are not transmitted to our servers.

Availability

The service may pause, fail, rate-limit, or change without notice. palmshed sdk is provided as-is, without a promise that every request will be processed or that every feature will be available.

Privacy

For site and contact-data handling, see the Privacy page. Third-party services such as Google, GitHub, and Vercel may process data under their own terms and policies.

Contact

For questions about these terms, get in touch.

Found something unexpected? Report an issue.
